summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: KOSPI maintains stability at 2650 points. Investors watching March-end semiconductor demand and global interest rate adjustments. Analysts suggest cautious optimism.
summary.art: Market continues to show institutional resilience in Q1 2026. Increasing interest in digital-physical hybrid works and high-end rarity.
